title.en: Guardiola in reported talks with Italy - would England come calling?
title.zh-CN: 瓜迪奥拉在与意大利的谈判中-英格兰会打电话来吗？

summary.en: Former Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola, a fluent Italian speaker, is a contender for the vacant Italy head coach job.
summary.zh-CN: 前曼城经理佩普·瓜迪奥拉（ Pep Guardiola ）是一位流利的意大利语演讲者，是意大利空缺主教练职位的竞争者。

title.en: Uefa president boycotts World Cup final in protest against Fifa
title.zh-CN: 欧足联主席抵制世界杯决赛以抗议国际足联

summary.en: Uefa president Aleksander Ceferin did not attend the World Cup final between Argentina and Spain in protest against Fifa.
summary.zh-CN: 欧足联主席亚历山大·塞费林（ Aleksander Ceferin ）没有参加阿根廷和西班牙之间的世界杯决赛，以抗议国际足联。

title.en: Ex-Villa striker Duran joins seventh club aged 22
title.zh-CN: 前别墅前锋杜兰22岁加入第七家俱乐部

summary.en: Former Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran joins Benfica on a season-long loan from Saudi Arabian side Al-Nassr.
summary.zh-CN: 前阿斯顿维拉前锋乔恩·杜兰（ Jhon Duran ）与本菲卡（ Benfica ）一起从沙特阿拉伯方面纳赛尔（ Al-Nassr ）租借了一个赛季。

title.en: Thank you for making this a World Cup to remember on the BBC
title.zh-CN: 感谢您将本届世界杯打造成英国广播公司令人难忘的盛事

summary.en: BBC Director of Sport Alex Kay-Jelski's message as BBC Sport delivers a record-breaking World Cup across TV, radio, online and social.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育总监亚历克斯·凯-耶尔斯基（ Alex Kay-Jelski ）作为英国广播公司体育（ BBC Sport ）的致辞，在电视、广播、在线和社交媒体

title.en: Rodri's stock at all-time high as he adds to trophy collection
title.zh-CN: Rodri的库存处于历史最高水平，因为他增加了奖杯收藏

summary.en: Rodri cements status as one of the world's best midfielders after World Cup and Golden Ball triumphs.
summary.zh-CN: 在世界杯和金球赛胜利后，罗德里巩固了自己作为世界上最好的中场之一的地位。

title.en: Man Utd and Arsenal fight over Kone - Tuesday's gossip
title.zh-CN: 曼联和阿森纳为通力而战-周二的八卦

summary.en: Manchester United and Arsenal fight over France's Manu Kone, Nico Williams could be heading to the Premier League champions, and West Ham reject latest Crysencio Summerville offer.
summary.zh-CN: 曼联和阿森纳为法国的马努·科内而战，尼科·威廉姆斯可能会晋级英超冠军，而西汉姆联则拒绝了最新的克里森西奥·萨默维尔的报价。

title.en: 'I'm proud of it' - Keegan looks back on career highlights and legacy
title.zh-CN: “我为此感到自豪” - Keegan回顾了职业生涯的亮点和遗产

summary.en: Kevin Keegan talks to Football Focus' Dan Walker in 2018 about some of the standout moments from his career - from winning World Player of the Year twice, to managing England and the iconic "I would...
summary.zh-CN: 凯文·基根（ Kevin Keegan ）在2018年与《足球焦点》（ Football Focus ）的丹·沃克（ Dan Walker ）谈论了他职业生涯中的一些杰出时刻--从两次赢得世界年度最佳球员，到管理英格兰，以及标志性的“我会…

title.en: Argentina boss Scaloni leaves press conference in tears
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷老板斯卡洛尼泪流满面地离开新闻发布会

summary.en: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni leaves his post-match news conference in tears when talking about his future after Sunday's World Cup final defeat by Spain.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷主教练莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼（ Lionel Scaloni ）在谈到周日世界杯决赛被西班牙击败后的未来时，泪流满面地离开了赛后新闻发布会。

title.en: 'A date with history and we got there first' - Spain react to World Cup win
title.zh-CN: “有历史的约会，我们先到达那里” -西班牙对世界杯胜利的反应

summary.en: Spain manager Luis de la Fuente and his players react to winning their second World Cup title after beating Argentina 1-0 after extra time in the final.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙主教练路易斯·德拉丰特（ Luis de la Fuente ）和他的球员在决赛加时赛后以1-0击败阿根廷后，对赢得第二个世界杯冠军做出了反应。

title.en: Could Infantino really push through a 64-team World Cup?
title.zh-CN: Infantino真的能通过64支球队的世界杯吗？

summary.en: If we have learned one thing from Gianni Infantino's Fifa tenure, it is that more is better. That could mean 64 teams at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 如果我们从Gianni Infantino的国际足联任期中学到了一件事，那就是越多越好。这可能意味着有64支球队参加世界杯。

title.zh-CN: 最佳进球、最佳球员、最佳球迷- BBC记者世界杯奖项

title.zh-CN: 别墅标志狼队中场戈麦斯，交易金额£ 3800万
